import pytest
from source import process_batch

def test_process_batch_includes_all_items():
    """Test that process_batch processes all items including the last one."""
    items = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
    result = process_batch(items)
    assert len(result) == len(items), f"Expected {len(items)} results but got {len(result)}"
    assert result == [2, 4, 6, 8, 10], f"Expected [2, 4, 6, 8, 10] but got {result}"
